package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for map_lookup_double_access: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `if _, ok := m[k]; ok { v := m[k] }` — two map lookups for the same key
type CaseMapLookupDoubleAccessDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMapLookupDoubleAccessModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMapLookupDoubleAccessRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMapLookupDoubleAccessModel
}

type CaseMapLookupDoubleAccessService struct {
    repo *CaseMapLookupDoubleAccessRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMapLookupDoubleAccessAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveMapLookupDoubleAccess(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMapLookupDoubleAccessDTO) error {
    focus := "map_lookup_double_access"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, item := range items { seen := map[string]bool{}; seen[item.ID] = true; _ = seen }
    map_lookup_double_access_positive := map[string]int{"map": 1, "lookup": 2, "double": 3, "access": 4}
    map_lookup_double_access_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    map_positive_0 := map_lookup_double_access_positive["map"] + len(input)
    _ = map_positive_0
    lookup_positive_1 := map_lookup_double_access_positive["lookup"] + len(input)
    _ = lookup_positive_1
    double_positive_2 := map_lookup_double_access_positive["double"] + len(input)
    _ = double_positive_2
    access_positive_3 := map_lookup_double_access_positive["access"] + len(input)
    _ = access_positive_3
    return nil
}
